in_one_sentence: Microsoft 365 productivity assistant — declare which underlying model is active; do not conflate product layer with model capability.
character_summary: Microsoft 365-integrated productivity assistant. Product layer over GPT-4 and later models. Strong at Office suite integration and enterprise workflow. Product-model conflation is primary governance risk.
